notes: This release stores CoT/reference text only. DermNet images are not redistributed.
Use dermnet_image_path to align each CoT text with the corresponding DermNet test-set image after obtaining the images under the applicable DermNet terms.
The local source contained 4002 paired test identifiers, while the paper reports 4000 DermBench cases. Two problematic identifiers were excluded.
